input.hiring_signal_brief: Hiring for 2 roles on LinkedIn; no mention of investor changes or product pivots.

candidate_output: CartaFlow’s recent Series C led by Sequoia means you’re expanding fast—our team has 5 engineers ready to scale your payment engine. Let’s move quickly before your funding runs out.
